question: In 2014, how many badges were earned by users in United States?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM badges AS b INNER JOIN users AS u ON b.UserId = u.Id WHERE b.Date >= '2014-01-01' AND b.Date <= '2014-12-31' AND u.Location = 'United States'

question: In 2013, show badge count by badge name for users in Germany.
expected_sql: SELECT b.Name AS badge_name, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM badges AS b INNER JOIN users AS u ON b.UserId = u.Id WHERE b.Date >= '2013-01-01' AND b.Date <= '2013-12-31' AND u.Location = 'Germany' GROUP BY b.Name

question: In 2014, show badge count by badge name for users in United States.
expected_sql: SELECT b.Name AS badge_name, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM badges AS b INNER JOIN users AS u ON b.UserId = u.Id WHERE b.Date >= '2014-01-01' AND b.Date <= '2014-12-31' AND u.Location = 'United States' GROUP BY b.Name

question: In 2014, how many Teacher badges were earned by users in Germany?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM badges AS b INNER JOIN users AS u ON b.UserId = u.Id WHERE b.Date >= '2014-01-01' AND b.Date <= '2014-12-31' AND u.Location = 'Germany' AND b.Name = 'Teacher'

question: In 2014, show post count by post type for owners in United States.
expected_sql: SELECT p.PostTypeId AS post_type_id, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM posts AS p INNER JOIN users AS u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE p.CreaionDate >= '2014-01-01' AND p.CreaionDate <= '2014-12-31' AND u.Location = 'United States' GROUP BY p.PostTypeId

question: In 2013, what was the total post score for question posts owned by users in Germany?
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(p.Score) AS metric_value FROM posts AS p INNER JOIN users AS u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE p.CreaionDate >= '2013-01-01' AND p.CreaionDate <= '2013-12-31' AND u.Location = 'Germany' AND p.PostTypeId = 1

question: In 2014, show comment count by commented post type for commenters in Germany.
expected_sql: SELECT p.PostTypeId AS comment_post_type_id, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM comments AS c INNER JOIN users AS u ON c.UserId = u.Id INNER JOIN posts AS p ON c.PostId = p.Id WHERE c.CreationDate >= '2014-01-01' AND c.CreationDate <= '2014-12-31' AND u.Location = 'Germany' GROUP BY p.PostTypeId

question: In 2014, show comment count by commented post type for post owners in Germany.
expected_sql: SELECT p.PostTypeId AS comment_post_type_id, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM comments AS c INNER JOIN posts AS p ON c.PostId = p.Id INNER JOIN users AS u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE c.CreationDate >= '2014-01-01' AND c.CreationDate <= '2014-12-31' AND u.Location = 'Germany' GROUP BY p.PostTypeId

question: In 2014, show comment count and total comment score by commented post type for post owners in United States.
expected_sql: SELECT p.PostTypeId AS comment_post_type_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count, SUM(c.Score) AS comment_score_total FROM comments AS c INNER JOIN posts AS p ON c.PostId = p.Id INNER JOIN users AS u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE c.CreationDate >= '2014-01-01' AND c.CreationDate <= '2014-12-31' AND u.Location = 'United States' GROUP BY p.PostTypeId

question: In 2011, show vote count by voted post type for post owners in United States.
expected_sql: SELECT p.PostTypeId AS vote_post_type_id, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM votes AS v INNER JOIN posts AS p ON v.PostId = p.Id INNER JOIN users AS u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE v.CreationDate >= '2011-01-01' AND v.CreationDate <= '2011-12-31' AND u.Location = 'United States' GROUP BY p.PostTypeId

question: In 2011, show vote count by voted post type and vote type for post owners in Germany.
expected_sql: SELECT p.PostTypeId AS vote_post_type_id, v.VoteTypeId AS vote_type_id, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM votes AS v INNER JOIN posts AS p ON v.PostId = p.Id INNER JOIN users AS u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE v.CreationDate >= '2011-01-01' AND v.CreationDate <= '2011-12-31' AND u.Location = 'Germany' GROUP BY p.PostTypeId, v.VoteTypeId

question: In 2011, how many votes were there for question posts owned by users in United States?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM votes AS v INNER JOIN posts AS p ON v.PostId = p.Id INNER JOIN users AS u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE v.CreationDate >= '2011-01-01' AND v.CreationDate <= '2011-12-31' AND u.Location = 'United States' AND p.PostTypeId = 1
